item.description:
🍎 `iData v0.1.2` focuses on stability, polish, and release packaging consistency.
- fixes first-render and session-switch cases where embedded `VisiData` could stay blank until a resize - improves the in-app help experience with a clearer onboarding-style layout and common `VisiData` shortcuts - refines the sidebar controls with pinning, clearer history actions, and cleaner release-vs-install instructions - keeps GitHub Releases, Sparkle metadata, app version, and packaging scripts aligned for in-app updates
